name: X (Formerly Twitter)
description: Post, like, and search tweets, send messages, search users, and add users to lists

endpoints.label: Create Direct Message

fields.label: User
fields.description: The user you want to send the message to (provide the ID)

fields.label: Text
fields.description: The text of the direct message. URL encoding is required. Max length of 10,000 characters.

endpoints.description: Send a direct message to a user

endpoints.label: Add Member List

fields.label: List
fields.description: The list you want to add the user to (provide the ID)

fields.label: User
fields.description: The user you want to add to the list (provide the ID)

endpoints.description: Add a member to a list

endpoints.label: Create Tweet

fields.label: Text
fields.description: The text of the status update. URLs must be encoded. Links wrapped with the t.co shortener will affect character count

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: location, attachments, inQuoteToStatusId, inReplyToStatusId)

endpoints.description: Create, quote, or reply to a tweet

fields.label: Tweet
fields.description: The tweet to delete (provide the ID)

fields.label: Tweet
fields.description: The tweet to like (provide the ID)

fields.label: Tweet
fields.description: The tweet to retweet (provide the ID)

endpoints.label: Search Tweet

fields.label: Search Term
fields.description: A UTF-8, URL-encoded search query of 500 characters maximum, including operators. Queries may additionally be limited by complexity. Check the searching examples here.

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: sortOrder, startTime, endTime, tweetFieldsObject)

endpoints.description: Search for tweets from the last seven days

fields.label: User
fields.description: The user you want to search (provide the ID)

fields.label: Me
fields.description: Whether you want to search the authenticated user
